title: Large Glass Vase, Black Glass Vase for Flowers, Large Flower Vases for Bouquet, Tall Wide Mouth Vases for Home, Wedding, Living Room, Office Decor, Wedding, Coffee Table, 23CM
features: Elegant Display: This large glass vase features a sleek, modern design that enhances any space. Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms or offices, its clear transparency showcases flowers beautifully.

Superior Craftsmanship: Handmade from premium glass, this tall vase boasts crystal clarity and a weighted base for stability. The smooth rim and wide mouth make cleaning effortless while maintaining elegance.

Versatile Styling: The large vase accommodates fresh blooms like roses and lilies, or dried arrangements. Its generous capacity works with peonies, sunflowers or decorative fillers for stunning displays.
Thoughtful Present: A clear glass vase makes an ideal gift for weddings, birthdays or Christmas. Timeless and practical, it's perfect for flower lovers and home decorators alike.

Secure Delivery: Your large vase arrives protected in sturdy packaging. We use reinforced materials to ensure this glass piece reaches you in perfect condition, ready to display your favourite flowers.
